hooks.command: INPUT=$(cat); CMD=$(echo "$INPUT" | jq -r '.tool_input.command // ""'); OUTPUT=$(echo "$INPUT" | jq -r '(.tool_response.stdout // .tool_response | tostring)'); if echo "$CMD" | grep -q 'gh pr create'; then PR_NUM=$(echo "$OUTPUT" | sed -n 's#.*/pull/\([0-9][0-9]*\).*#\1#p' | head -1); if [ -n "$PR_NUM" ]; then jq -n --arg msg "PR #${PR_NUM} was just created. Run /loop 5m /address-pr-comments ${PR_NUM} to keep on top of review feedback." '{"hookSpecificOutput": {"hookEventName": "PostToolUse", "additionalContext": $msg}}'; fi; fi
